perFrameCode: // q2 -> W-based color fade factor, range:.5 to 3 [.5->inverse square, 2-> square, 3->cubical]
// q5 -> radius decay factor, range:0 to .5 [0->no decay, .5->maximum]
// q6 -> coloring mode, 0 or 1 [0->per distance based, 1->per angle]
